show dnos-internal routing bgp paths
-----------------------------------------------

**Minimum user role:** viewer

To display internal BGP path information:

**Command syntax:show dnos-internal routing bgp paths** 

**Command mode:** operation

**Example**
::

	dnRouter# show dnos-internal bgp paths
	Address                     Refcnt    Path
	[0x55e44035a550:3779625002] (73650)   4202957
	[0x55e43f595840:1478066276] (73650)   4202924
	[0x55e441bbbe30:3972563128] (73650)   4202964
	[0x55e454965ba0:833323316]  (439602)  64999 4202950
	[0x55e454ca2560:3458335226] (29600)   64999 4200781
	[0x55e4549428c0:1067713191] (339250)  64999 4202940
	[0x55e43f4fc060:2378400450] (5100)    4200766
	[0x55e442ab58e0:50889451]   (73650)   4202934
	[0x55e455632680:1498874659] (29600)   64999 4200735
	[0x55e455605c20:3242984322] (29600)   64999 4200716
	[0x55e455624200:3892642776] (29600)   64999 4200729
	[0x55e43ff17940:2388395160] (73650)   4202902
	[0x55e442b275d0:3451848013] (5100)    4200761
	[0x55e4555f2e80:2449966443] (29600)   64999 4200708
	[0x55e4549bdb60:1021052423] (339250)  64999 4202975
	[0x55e440c21a00:3187410727] (73650)   4202992
	[0x55e44112d500:2516289324] (73650)   4202955
	[0x55e43d7696d0:1201309787] (73650)   4202996
	[0x55e4548dc8c0:4081453257] (339250)  64999 4202911
	[0x55e442ea1dd0:1064012064] (5100)    4200751
	[0x55e454ca92c0:2040301863] (29600)   64999 4200784
	[0x55e4433b27b0:2955905352] (73650)   4202928
	[0x55e454c966c0:783157596]  (29600)    64999 4200776
	[0x55e454c66620:3948775797] (29600)   64999 4200759
	[0x55e4416dd8b0:3938159033] (5100)    4200714
	[0x55e4555f0aa0:3205139072] (29600)   64999 4200707
	[0x55e4549b6b40:3665922705] (339250)  64999 4202973
	...

.. **Help line:** Displays internal bgp path information
